rationale: Brief-level golds for AAPL = the ticker-prefixed curated gold/expected chunks from the frozen Q&A eval set (real chunk ids). A good AAPL brief should surface these in its section retrievals and cite them without fabrication.

Brief-level golds for MSFT = the ticker-prefixed curated gold/expected chunks from the frozen Q&A eval set (real chunk ids). A good MSFT brief should surface these in its section retrievals and cite them without fabrication.
